Our Story

✦ This is a place for Eric & I to share our latest photos, news, and interests with our friends and relatives. We hope you enjoy the site! ✦

scroll through our memories
chapter by chapter

Our Timeline

  • 🌸 February 2026

    February was thankfully an uneventful month, which helped us to recover from a rough January. We had a lot of sun mixed in with some bouts of snow.

  • 🌸 January 2026

    Our 2026 got off to a sad start. While still mourning the loss of our cat Lily, we had the bigger blow of the passing of Eric's dad Dan. I made a page of memories of him that helped me to process it. I also have a page for the other things that happened this month.

  • 🌸 December 2025

    This month was full of Christmas activities, a short trip into Canada, and a longer trip for Shawnna to Oklahoma. Unfortunately, it was also a sad month which included the loss of our cat Lily. When I made a web page of memories of her, I realized I hadn't made one for sweet Feisty who died in 2024, so I made her a memory page too.

— with all my love ♡
